title: ephedra fragilis var. gibraltarica
intro: Ephedra fragilis var. gibraltarica is a variety of the ephedra plant, specifically a type of shrub-like plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and Gibraltar. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its rich content of ephedrine and pseudoephedrine, compounds that can help to stimulate the cardiovascular system and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of ephedra fragilis var. gibraltarica include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory ailments, as well as its potential to increase energy and enhance mental clarity. Ephedra fragilis var. gibraltarica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support respiratory health and promote overall well-being.
